options: Only changes to properties you name
questions.explanation: You list the properties to transition (or use `all`).

questions.code:
.btn { transition: background 200ms; }
.btn:hover { background: red; color: white; }
questions.explanation: Only background is listed, so color changes instantly.
ease is the default — starts slow, speeds up, slows down.

questions.prompt: Can you transition from `display: none` to `display: block`?
options: Not directly — you need @starting-style + transition-behavior: allow-discrete (or fade opacity)
questions.explanation: Modern CSS finally allows this with allow-discrete + @starting-style.

options: Can transition properties you didn't intend to (slower + surprises)
questions.explanation: Name specific properties for predictable, performant transitions.
